__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: thermal conductivity k at 25 °C plus moisture absorption percentage for mycelium-substrate hemp/wood-flour insulation panel

operating_conditions.substrate: hemp hurd + wood flour bound by Ganoderma / Pleurotus mycelial network

model_caveat: Universal FFs are atomistic — they predict cell-wall energetics + chitin-glucan bonding in the mycelial network, NOT panel-scale effective thermal conductivity (a porous-media homogenization property). Thermal conductivity is dominated by the porosity (typically 80-90 %) + connectivity of the air-filled lumens. The 0.05 W/(m·K) value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: Ecovative MycoComposite + Mogu panel datasheets at typical 200-250 kg/m³ density.
proxy_source: Ecovative MycoComposite product datasheet (2024) — declared k ≈ 0.05 W/(m·K) at 200 kg/m³; Yang et al. 2017 Mater. Lett. 187:78 (mycelium-bound agricultural-waste composite k = 0.04-0.07 W/(m·K) over 100-300 kg/m³ density); Jones et al. 2020 Mater. Des. 187:108397 (mycelium-composite mechanical + thermal review); Mogu acoustic-panel datasheet 2023 (Italian commercial mycelium vendor)
falsifier_text: thermal conductivity > 0.06 W/(m·K) OR moisture absorption > 30% → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: mycelium scaffold biodegradability UNVERIFIED at industrial-compost scale (ASTM D5511 + EN 13432 lab certification only)
mycelium fire-classification (Euroclass B/C) UNVERIFIED at production density grade
moisture-cycling stability across humidity swings HARD_WALL — mycelium is a living-grown then heat-killed substrate; freeze-thaw + 95% RH long-term UNVERIFIED
panel-to-panel k variability ± 30 % across batches UNVERIFIED at scaled production (Ecovative single-line baseline only)
competing PU + XPS foam baseline k ≈ 0.025-0.035 W/(m·K) — mycelium is a comparable but not superior insulator
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy vendor + paper values. PASS does NOT close the candidate — biodegradability UNVERIFIED + fire-classification UNVERIFIED are binding non-thermal risks per `wood-cellulose/wood-cellulose.md` corpus. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED. Building-system installation + code-compliance → out-of-software / Category (c).
license_note: Vendor datasheet values per Ecovative / Mogu public product literature; peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
